description: Abstract the worktree table TUI to pkg/tui with consistent theming and async data loading support. Create a reusable Table component that matches the wizard component library styling and gracefully handles async data with per-cell spinners. Test via new `gbm2 wt testls` command.

userStories.title: Create TableTheme in pkg/tui/theme.go
userStories.description: As a developer, I need consistent table styling that matches the existing Theme structure so the table looks like part of the same component library.
acceptanceCriteria: Add TableStyles struct with Header, Selected, Cell, and Border styles
Add TableStyles field to Theme struct
Update DefaultTheme() to include sensible table style defaults
Styles use consistent color palette with existing Focused/Blurred styles
Just validate passes

userStories.title: Create async.Cell type for per-cell async loading
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a way to represent a table cell that may be loading async data so I can show spinners for cells awaiting data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create pkg/tui/async/cell.go with Cell[T] type
Cell wraps Eval[T] and adds spinner state
Cell has View() method returning value string or spinner
Cell has StartLoading() method that returns tea.Cmd for async fetch
Just validate passes

userStories.title: Create Table component in pkg/tui/table.go
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a reusable Table component that wraps bubbles/table with theme support and async cell rendering.
acceptanceCriteria: Create Table struct wrapping github.com/charmbracelet/bubbles/table
Table accepts *tui.Context for theme and dimensions
Table applies styles from Theme.Table to bubbles/table
Table implements Init(), Update(), View() as tea.Model
Add WithColumns, WithRows, WithHeight builder methods
Just validate passes

userStories.title: Add AsyncRow support to Table for per-cell spinners
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to define rows with async cells so the table can show spinners while data loads.
acceptanceCriteria: Create AsyncRow type that holds static and async cell values
Table can render async cells with spinners via tick-based updates
Add Row.WithAsyncCell(col int, cell *async.Cell) method
Spinner renders in the cell until async data is loaded
Just validate passes

userStories.title: Add helper constructors for common table patterns
userStories.description: As a developer, I need convenient constructors for building themed tables quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add NewTable(ctx *tui.Context) *Table constructor
Add Column{Title, Width} type for cleaner column definitions
Add table.SetAsyncCell(row, col int, cell *async.Cell) method
Just validate passes

userStories.title: Create gbm2 wt testls command
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a test command to manually verify the new table abstraction with mock data and configurable delay.
acceptanceCriteria: Create cmd/service/worktree_testls.go with testls command
Command has --delay flag (0-5000ms) like testadd for simulating network latency
Uses mock worktree data (5-10 sample worktrees, mix of tracked and ad-hoc)
Create mock git service for table operations (pull, push, delete, get status)
Mock service simulates async operations with configurable delay
Table displays immediately with static columns (Name, Branch, Kind)
Git status column shows spinner while loading, then displays status
Register command in worktree.go subcommands
Just validate passes
Run 'just install' to build and install gbm2 to /usr/local/bin
Use validate-tmux-session skill to manually test all functionality
userStories.notes: Follow same pattern as worktree_testadd.go. Build with 'just install' before tmux testing.

userStories.title: Validate testls navigation and footer help
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the table navigation and help text display correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Use validate-tmux-session skill for all testing
Footer shows help text: up/down navigate, space/enter select, l pull, p push, d delete, q/esc quit
Footer dynamically hides 'p: push' when tracked worktree is selected
Navigation with up/down arrows works correctly
Navigation wraps at top/bottom of list
Pressing q or esc quits the table
Pressing space or enter outputs selected worktree path and quits
userStories.notes: Test after US-006. Run: gbm2 wt testls

userStories.title: Validate testls pull/push operations and messaging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify pull and push operations show appropriate messages that auto-dismiss.
acceptanceCriteria: Use validate-tmux-session skill for all testing
Pressing 'l' shows 'Pulling worktree...' message during operation
After pull completes, shows 'Successfully pulled' message
Pressing 'p' on ad-hoc worktree shows 'Pushing worktree...' message
After push completes, shows 'Successfully pushed' message
Pressing 'p' on tracked worktree shows 'Cannot push tracked worktree' error
All messages auto-dismiss after 3-5 seconds of inactivity
Git status column updates after pull/push operations
userStories.notes: Test with --delay 1000 to see message timing. Messages should clear automatically.

userStories.title: Validate testls delete confirmation flow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify the delete confirmation flow works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Use validate-tmux-session skill for all testing
Pressing 'd' shows confirmation prompt: 'Delete worktree X? (y/n)'
Pressing 'n' or 'esc' cancels deletion and clears prompt
Pressing 'y' performs deletion and shows success message
After deletion, worktree is removed from table
Success message auto-dismisses after 3-5 seconds
userStories.notes: Test delete on mock worktrees - they won't actually delete anything.

userStories.title: Add tests for async table rendering
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests to verify the async table loading behavior works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests in pkg/tui/table_test.go for Table component
Test async cell rendering shows spinner then value
Test theme styles are applied correctly
Tests pass with just test-changed or go test ./pkg/tui/...
